column1: We (not to send) them the message tomorrow.
She (not to get) up at 6 o'clock tomorrow.
He (to go) to the gym next week
Our neighbors (to move) to Germany next month.
I (to have) dinner with my friends at the moment and I am very happy to see them again.
Look at the dog. It (to go) to bite you.
Get back! The bomb (to go) to explode.
I (to go) to wear my new skirt for the party.
